package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_repository: Code outside repositories that manually scans rows into structs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule193NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule193NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule193NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario193Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule193NegativeService, input Rule193NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
